ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-21-2022 Continued To Oct-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Continued To Sep-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-09-2022 Continued To Sep-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stuart Bronstein and Julie Westerling, via Zoom, for Kevin Lee, Personal Representative.

Mr. Bronstein advises that he now understands regarding the additional information that the court is requesting in order to grant the petition. The court acknowledges the supplement that was filed and confirms that the court is not certain that it agrees with what Louise's intent might have been and confirms what additional information it is expecting within the supplemental filings. Mr. Bronstein acknowledges the court's position. The court advises that it will be expecting an order indicating exactly how the trusts will be funded.

The matter is continued to Sep-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Continued To Aug-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Stuart Bronstein, via Zoom, for Kevin Lee, Personal Representative.

The court confirms with counsel that the GST exemption amount for a non-citizen is $13,000 and offers additional testimony in support of his position. The court advises counsel that it does not agree with counsel's position and offers counsel its position. Counsel offers additional advocacy after which the court reiterates its position. Counsel requests a continuance to allow for the filing of supplements.

The matter is continued to Aug-09-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
